title: PublicInterestRequest
description: A Public Interest demand issued by the NYC Public Advocate — the office's charter power to compel a city agency to produce information or take action in the public interest. Today these demands and their responses live only in correspondence and reports, with no machine-readable surface. Proposed schema for tracking an oversight/records-access request and the agency's response.

requestId.description: Identifier for the public interest request.

subject.description: What information or action is being demanded.

description.description: Full text / basis of the demand.
